Skip to contents
readecb 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

EURIBOR interbank lending rates

Source: R/ecb_euribor.R
ecb_euribor.Rd

Returns EURIBOR (Euro Interbank Offered Rate) at one or more tenors. EURIBOR is the benchmark rate at which euro area banks lend to each other, widely used as a reference rate for mortgages, loans, and derivatives.

Usage

ecb_euribor(tenor = "3M", from = NULL, to = NULL, cache = TRUE)

Arguments

tenor

One or more of "1M" (1 month), "3M" (default), "6M", or "12M".

from

Optional start date.

to

Optional end date.

cache

Logical. Use cached data if available (default TRUE).

Value

A data frame with columns:

date

Date.

tenor

Character. EURIBOR maturity.

value

Numeric. Rate in percent per annum.

Examples

# \donttest{
ecb_euribor("3M", from = "2022-01")
#> ℹ Fetching EURIBOR data
#> ✔ Fetching EURIBOR data [189ms]
#> 
#>          date tenor      value
#> 1  2022-01-01    3M -0.5601429
#> 2  2022-02-01    3M -0.5315000
#> 3  2022-03-01    3M -0.4954348
#> 4  2022-04-01    3M -0.4478947
#> 5  2022-05-01    3M -0.3857273
#> 6  2022-06-01    3M -0.2392273
#> 7  2022-07-01    3M  0.0366190
#> 8  2022-08-01    3M  0.3947391
#> 9  2022-09-01    3M  1.0108636
#> 10 2022-10-01    3M  1.4276667
#> 11 2022-11-01    3M  1.8252273
#> 12 2022-12-01    3M  2.0634762
#> 13 2023-01-01    3M  2.3448636
#> 14 2023-02-01    3M  2.6403500
#> 15 2023-03-01    3M  2.9105652
#> 16 2023-04-01    3M  3.1794444
#> 17 2023-05-01    3M  3.3717273
#> 18 2023-06-01    3M  3.5358636
#> 19 2023-07-01    3M  3.6718095
#> 20 2023-08-01    3M  3.7803043
#> 21 2023-09-01    3M  3.8800476
#> 22 2023-10-01    3M  3.9676364
#> 23 2023-11-01    3M  3.9716364
#> 24 2023-12-01    3M  3.9348947
#> 25 2024-01-01    3M  3.9252727
#> 26 2024-02-01    3M  3.9231905
#> 27 2024-03-01    3M  3.9231000
#> 28 2024-04-01    3M  3.8853333
#> 29 2024-05-01    3M  3.8126818
#> 30 2024-06-01    3M  3.7245000
#> 31 2024-07-01    3M  3.6848261
#> 32 2024-08-01    3M  3.5475909
#> 33 2024-09-01    3M  3.4337143
#> 34 2024-10-01    3M  3.1666087
#> 35 2024-11-01    3M  3.0067619
#> 36 2024-12-01    3M  2.8246000
#> 37 2025-01-01    3M  2.7042727
#> 38 2025-02-01    3M  2.5249500
#> 39 2025-03-01    3M  2.4424286
#> 40 2025-04-01    3M  2.2494000
#> 41 2025-05-01    3M  2.0872381
#> 42 2025-06-01    3M  1.9836190
#> 43 2025-07-01    3M  1.9863478
#> 44 2025-08-01    3M  2.0210952
#> 45 2025-09-01    3M  2.0272727
#> 46 2025-10-01    3M  2.0344348
#> 47 2025-11-01    3M  2.0416500
#> 48 2025-12-01    3M  2.0484286
#> 49 2026-01-01    3M  2.0277273
#> 50 2026-02-01    3M  2.0113000
ecb_euribor(c("1M", "3M", "6M", "12M"), from = "2024-01")
#> ℹ Fetching EURIBOR data
#> ✔ Fetching EURIBOR data [199ms]
#> 
#>           date tenor    value
#> 1   2024-01-01   12M 3.609227
#> 2   2024-02-01   12M 3.670524
#> 3   2024-03-01   12M 3.717850
#> 4   2024-04-01   12M 3.703333
#> 5   2024-05-01   12M 3.680136
#> 6   2024-06-01   12M 3.649600
#> 7   2024-07-01   12M 3.525913
#> 8   2024-08-01   12M 3.166136
#> 9   2024-09-01   12M 2.936048
#> 10  2024-10-01   12M 2.691304
#> 11  2024-11-01   12M 2.505571
#> 12  2024-12-01   12M 2.436050
#> 13  2025-01-01   12M 2.525227
#> 14  2025-02-01   12M 2.406950
#> 15  2025-03-01   12M 2.398381
#> 16  2025-04-01   12M 2.143400
#> 17  2025-05-01   12M 2.080571
#> 18  2025-06-01   12M 2.080905
#> 19  2025-07-01   12M 2.079087
#> 20  2025-08-01   12M 2.113905
#> 21  2025-09-01   12M 2.171500
#> 22  2025-10-01   12M 2.187304
#> 23  2025-11-01   12M 2.216900
#> 24  2025-12-01   12M 2.267143
#> 25  2026-01-01   12M 2.245318
#> 26  2026-02-01   12M 2.220700
#> 27  2024-01-01    1M 3.869000
#> 28  2024-02-01    1M 3.868476
#> 29  2024-03-01    1M 3.852950
#> 30  2024-04-01    1M 3.852524
#> 31  2024-05-01    1M 3.815909
#> 32  2024-06-01    1M 3.634700
#> 33  2024-07-01    1M 3.617522
#> 34  2024-08-01    1M 3.596727
#> 35  2024-09-01    1M 3.438095
#> 36  2024-10-01    1M 3.205478
#> 37  2024-11-01    1M 3.066429
#> 38  2024-12-01    1M 2.890050
#> 39  2025-01-01    1M 2.791864
#> 40  2025-02-01    1M 2.605750
#> 41  2025-03-01    1M 2.401000
#> 42  2025-04-01    1M 2.242650
#> 43  2025-05-01    1M 2.093905
#> 44  2025-06-01    1M 1.928524
#> 45  2025-07-01    1M 1.892261
#> 46  2025-08-01    1M 1.890000
#> 47  2025-09-01    1M 1.897227
#> 48  2025-10-01    1M 1.906261
#> 49  2025-11-01    1M 1.905600
#> 50  2025-12-01    1M 1.915476
#> 51  2026-01-01    1M 1.958546
#> 52  2026-02-01    1M 1.952250
#> 53  2024-01-01    3M 3.925273
